implementedObjectClassification: discrete-only weighted reciprocal source-block replay candidate / VO-7 building block

conventionDefinitions.stiffnessActionMatrix: K = persisted Euclidean-Hermitian Phase12 assembled Dirac matrix
conventionDefinitions.stiffnessVariation: deltaK = persisted or analytic Euclidean-Hermitian first-variation stiffness matrix
conventionDefinitions.massPsiVariation: delta M_psi = 0 for fixed-mesh connection-space perturbations b_k
conventionDefinitions.reciprocalRealDerivative: d J_k(psi)[chi] = Re<chi, deltaA psi>_M + Re<psi, deltaA chi>_M
conventionDefinitions.hermitianShortcut: d J_k(psi)[chi] = 2 Re<chi, deltaA psi>_M when deltaK is Euclidean-Hermitian and deltaA is M-self-adjoint

sourceSelection.sourceRule: select repaired shared-solver weighted fermion mode with minimum modeIndex; no physical boson target, observed mass, or external calibration consulted
sourceSelection.directionRule: evaluate every repaired shared-solver weighted fermion mode chi_i ordered by modeIndex

explicitDiscreteOnlyNonclaims: not a completed GU fermionic action
not a fixed GU fermionic branch
no explicit Yukawa functional or solved coupling map
no coupled residual or completed mixed linearization blocks
no target-independent W/Z bridge source law
no Higgs scalar source operator or scalar projection theorem
no Phase201 or Phase256 contract fill
selected Phase12 shared weighted modes are kernel modes; this is not a nonzero-spectrum eigenmode proof

solverNotes: Solved B=M_psi^-1/2 K M_psi^-1/2, then returned psi=M_psi^-1/2 u with M_psi normalization.
Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.

Residuals are ||K psi - lambda M_psi psi||_2 / ||psi||_Mpsi in the original stiffness variables.
Dense Hermitian Jacobi reference path is bounded to totalDof <= 512; it is intended for current explicit matrices, not production-scale spectra.

decision: The repaired shared weighted modes replay the reciprocal discrete source-block candidate across both Phase12 stiffness matrices and all 24 persisted/analytic variations. All 288 weighted direction checks pass. The selected Phase12 weighted modes are kernel modes, and the replay has zero nonzero source currents and zero nonzero reciprocal derivatives. This remains a discrete-only zero-mode replay, not a nonzero-spectrum eigenmode proof or physical GU prediction route.
